creator: dfilter@FreeBSD.ORG
text:
Author: ale
Date: Wed Apr 24 15:41:22 2013
New Revision: 316443
URL: http://svnweb.freebsd.org/changeset/ports/316443

Log:
  Update to 1.0.15 release.
  
  PR:		ports/178109
  Submitted by:	girgen

Modified:
  head/devel/jakarta-commons-daemon/Makefile
  head/devel/jakarta-commons-daemon/distinfo

Modified: head/devel/jakarta-commons-daemon/Makefile
==============================================================================
--- head/devel/jakarta-commons-daemon/Makefile	Wed Apr 24 15:35:19 2013	(r316442)
+++ head/devel/jakarta-commons-daemon/Makefile	Wed Apr 24 15:41:22 2013	(r316443)
@@ -2,8 +2,7 @@
 # $FreeBSD$
 
 PORTNAME=	commons-daemon
-PORTVERSION=	1.0.10
-PORTREVISION=	1
+PORTVERSION=	1.0.15
 CATEGORIES=	devel java
 MASTER_SITES=	${MASTER_SITE_APACHE_COMMONS_SOURCE:S,$,:src,} \
 		${MASTER_SITE_APACHE_COMMONS_BINARIES:S,$,:bin,}
@@ -30,10 +29,12 @@ PLIST_FILES=	bin/jsvc %%JAVAJARDIR%%/${P
 
 PORTDOCS=	*
 
+.include <bsd.port.options.mk>
+
 do-install:
 	${INSTALL_PROGRAM} ${WRKSRC}/jsvc ${PREFIX}/bin
 	${INSTALL_DATA} ${WRKBIN}/${DISTNAME}.jar ${JAVAJARDIR}/${PORTNAME}.jar
-.if !defined(NOPORTDOCS)
+.if ${PORT_OPTIONS:MDOCS}
 	${MKDIR} ${DOCSDIR}
 	cd ${WRKBIN} && ${COPYTREE_SHARE} apidocs ${DOCSDIR}
 .endif

+SIZE (commons-daemon-1.0.15-native-src.tar.gz) = 204944
+SHA256 (commons-daemon-1.0.15-bin.tar.gz) = 0dab09bd0d2028000367a6d5c1592b92c71b561a3f98838f6162ae1623e139d8
